About Jax Pro Pressure Washing, LLC

12+ years serving Jacksonville and surrounding areas

Jax Pro Pressure Washing was founded over a decade ago with a simple mission: to provide Jacksonville homeowners with reliable, high-quality exterior cleaning services. We’re a family-owned and operated business, deeply rooted in this community.

We believe in doing things right the first time. Our team uses professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly cleaning solutions to deliver exceptional results without damaging your property or harming the environment. We focus on attention to detail, ensuring every surface is thoroughly cleaned.

We're committed to giving back to the community that has supported us. Jax Pro proudly sponsors local youth sports teams and participates in neighborhood clean-up initiatives. We believe a clean community is a thriving community.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
Jax Pro Pressure Washing, LLC

Trusted power washing professionals serving Jacksonville, FL and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
